introduction.title: INTRODUCTION
body: In India an elephant was brought before five blind men. One touched the elephant’s side and said, “The elephant is like a wall.” Another touched his leg and said, “No, the elephant is like a tree.” The third man touched the elephant’s ear and said the elephant was like a palm leaf. The fourth touched his trunk and said, “The elephant is like a snake.” The last blind man touched his tail and said, “The elephant is like a rope.”
All five were right. But only the guy with his eyes open can put all the pieces together and see the elephant like he really is!
The same holds true for God.
God is so big, so beyond our human comprehension that none of us will ever be able to see Him fully as He is, comprehend Him, or appreciate Him, neither in this life, nor in the one to come.

Knowledge of God and His kingdom have been the subject of study by countless since the beginning of time and can be likened unto a jewel: A jewel of the most precious kind. A jewel, priceless and rare. A multi faceted treasure.
We offer you here a few of those facets.

authors_note.title: AUTHOR’S NOTE
body: Twenty years ago we started sending out a short “reflection” to a small group of friends.
Over the years these evolved into the texts in my book of the same title and are now read daily by millions. These are the Daily Reflections included in this app.
We sincerely believe that these reflections will help you come to be at peace with God, nurture harmony in your home and find peace with yourself.

preface.title: PREFACE
body: For thousands of years organized religions have taught fear of God rather than love of God.

Many people today still judge, condemn, and pressure others to conform to what they say God expects of us. Young people are increasingly being turned off to God when they see the self righteous attitudes of so many church goers.

These reflections offer a new and refreshing outlook on the force behind our universe, the loving power that we call *God*, and will surely either redefine or reinforce your concept of Him. Discover for yourself His unconditional acceptance and love.

what_people_say.title: WHAT THE PEOPLE SAY
body: “Your app has been a healing balm for me.”
“You have helped me know God in a way I never could through church.”
“This is such a special app and has been a real inspiration for me.”
“Powerful words coming straight from the heart of God!”
“The reflections in this app uplift my soul.”
“Since reading your Daily Reflections my whole life has changed.”
“Every morning I receive strength through what I read in this app. I can’t thank you enough.”
“Things they sure don’t tell you in church!”
“Thank you God for always speaking to me through this app when I most need to hear Your Word.”
“What a PERFECT message for me today. This couldn’t have been any more on target!”
“I have been reading your Reflections every day for three years and have learnt so much, how to pray, study the Bible, love, forgive, be patient... a lot. I can’t even manage to mention them all.”
“In times of difficulty the messages in this app give me strength.”
“I have finally broken free from the feelings of guilt that my church instilled in me.”
“Today’s reflection was so timely! It was almost identical to what I wrote just five minutes ago to my former coworkers. A perfect confirmation from God.”
“You are like angels sent from God to bring me these words.”
“Today more than ever we need to hear these messages.”
“I look forward to reading your Reflections every day. Thank you for being a blessing in my life.”
